final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input set,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge set or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (set)
            q <= 4'b1111;  // Set register
        else
            q <= d;  // Load data
    end

endmodule
